findings.section: Long-Term Insulin and Oral Hypoglycemics Information
findings.summary: The older version from October 1, 2024, directs users to section I.C.4.a.3 for information on the long-term use of insulin and oral hypoglycemics. The newer version from October 2025 contains identical text and instructions, referencing the same section for the same clinical information. There are no modifications to the coding logic, scope, or definitions between the two versions. The text appears to be a static navigational reference that has not been updated.
findings.detail: October 1, 2024 (Older): See section I.C.4.a.3 for information on the long-term use of insulin and oral hypoglycemics. -> October 2025 (New Version): See section I.C.4.a.3 for information on the long-term use of insulin and oral hypoglycemics.
